pr.title: Record: Chunk-Based N-gram Backoff + Score-First TTT (0.295 BPB)

output.summary: Chunk-based order-9 n-gram backoff with entropy-adaptive interpolation and synchronized multi-GPU cache updates complements the GPTQ int5 model plus score-first TTT.
techniques: Chunk-based order-9 n-gram cache with entropy-adaptive interpolation
Synchronized 1M-token chunk updates across GPUs to maximize cache utility
Score-first TTT with LoRA/AdamW on already-scored validation tokens
